# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Primitive = string | number | boolean | null;
type KvKeyPart = string | number | bigint | boolean | Uint8Array;
type JsonObject = Record<string, unknown>;

interface UserRecord {
  id: string;
  email?: string;
  name?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
  country?: string;
  age?: number;
  createdAt?: string;
  [key: string]: unknown;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function json(data: unknown, status = 200, headers: HeadersInit = {}) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

function text(message: string, status = 400) {
  return new Response(message, { status });
}

function normalizeValue(value: string): Primitive {
  if (value === "null") return null;
  if (value === "true") return true;
  if (value === "false") return false;
  const num = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isNaN(num) && value.trim() !== "") return num;
  return value;
}

function sanitizeKeyPart(value: string): string {
  return value.trim().toLowerCase();
}

function isKvKeyPart(value: unknown): value is KvKeyPart {
  return (
    typeof value === "string" ||
    typeof value === "number" ||
    typeof value === "bigint" ||
    typeof value === "boolean" ||
    value instanceof Uint8Array
  );
}

function pickSearchFilters(params: URLSearchParams) {
  const reserved = new Set(["limit", "offset", "userId", "id"]);
  const filters: Array<{ field: string; value: Primitive }> = [];
  for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
    if (reserved.has(key)) continue;
    filters.push({
      field: sanitizeKeyPart(key),
      value: normalizeValue(value),
    });
  }
  return filters;
}

function buildIndexKey(field: string, value: Primitive, userId: string) {
  return ["users", userId, "filters", field, String(value)] as const;
}

function buildRecordKey(userId: string) {
  return ["users", userId] as const;
}

async function putUser(user: UserRecord) {
  if (!user.id || typeof user.id !== "string") {
    throw new Error("User id is required");
  }

  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(user.id);
  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.set(buildRecordKey(userId), { ...user, id: userId });

  for (const [field, rawValue] of Object.entries(user)) {
    if (field === "id") continue;
    if (rawValue === undefined) continue;
    if (!isKvKeyPart(typeof rawValue === "string" ? String(rawValue) : rawValue)) {
      continue;
    }
    const indexKey = buildIndexKey(
      sanitizeKeyPart(field),
      rawValue as Primitive,
      userId,
    );
    atomic.set(indexKey, true);
  }

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  if (!result.ok) {
    throw new Error("Failed to store user");
  }

  return { ...user, id: userId };
}

async function getUser(userId: string) {
  const entry = await kv.get<UserRecord>(buildRecordKey(sanitizeKeyPart(userId)));
  return entry.value;
}

async function searchUsersByFilters(
  params: URLSearchParams,
): Promise<UserRecord[]> {
  const filters = pickSearchFilters(params);
  const limit = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(params.get("limit") ?? "25")));
  const offset = Math.max(0, Number(params.get("offset") ?? "0"));
  const explicitUserId = params.get("userId") ?? params.get("id");

  if (explicitUserId) {
    const user = await getUser(explicitUserId);
    if (!user) return [];
    const matches = filters.every((filter) => {
      return user[filter.field] === filter.value;
    });
    return matches ? [user] : [];
  }

  if (filters.length === 0) {
    const users: UserRecord[] = [];
    let skipped = 0;
    for await (const entry of kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix: ["users"] })) {
      if (entry.key.length !== 2) continue;
      if (skipped < offset) {
        skipped++;
        continue;
      }
      users.push(entry.value);
      if (users.length >= limit) break;
    }
    return users;
  }

  const candidateIds = new Set<string>();

  for (const filter of filters) {
    const field = sanitizeKeyPart(filter.field);
    const value = String(filter.value);
    const prefix = ["users"] as KvKeyPart[];
    const collectedForThisFilter = new Set<string>();

    for await (const entry of kv.list({ prefix })) {
      const key = entry.key;
      if (
        key.length === 5 &&
        key[0] === "users" &&
        key[2] === "filters" &&
        key[3] === field &&
        key[4] === value
      ) {
        const userId = String(key[1]);
        collectedForThisFilter.add(userId);
      }
    }

    if (candidateIds.size === 0) {
      for (const id of collectedForThisFilter) candidateIds.add(id);
    } else {
      for (const id of [...candidateIds]) {
        if (!collectedForThisFilter.has(id)) candidateIds.delete(id);
      }
    }

    if (candidateIds.size === 0) break;
  }

  const ids = [...candidateIds].slice(offset, offset + limit);
  const users = await Promise.all(ids.map((id) => getUser(id)));
  return users.filter((u): u is UserRecord => Boolean(u));
}

serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const { pathname } = url;

  try {
    if (req.method === "POST" && pathname === "/users") {
      const body = await req.json() as UserRecord;
      const user = await putUser(body);
      return json({ ok: true, user }, 201);
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = pathname.split("/")[2];
      if (!userId) return text("Missing user id", 400);
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      if (!user) return json({ ok: false, error: "Not found" }, 404);
      return json({ ok: true, user });
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/users/search") {
      const users = await searchUsersByFilters(url.searchParams);
      return json({
        ok: true,
        count: users.length,
        filters: Object.fromEntries(
          [...url.searchParams.entries()].filter(([k]) =>
            !["limit", "offset", "userId", "id"].includes(k)
          ),
        ),
        users,
      });
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/health") {
      return json({ ok: true });
    }

    return json({ ok: false, error: "Not found" }, 404);
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      {
        ok: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Internal error",
      },
      500,
    );
  }
});
